name: Topgolf
about: Topgolf Augusta is a premier entertainment destination in Augusta, GA. It features all-weather hitting bays equipped with cooling fans in the summer and heated bays in the winter, along with HDTVs in every bay and throughout the sports bar and restaurant. The venue utilizes high-tech balls that score automatically when aimed at giant outfield targets, using complimentary or personal clubs. Pricing is structured on a per-hour, per-bay basis, with discounts available during off-peak hours and special promotions like Topgolf Nights and Sunday Funday, making it suitable for both casual play and group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round comfort with heated and cooled bays
Giant outfield targets with automatic scoring
Variety of games suitable for all skill levels
Integrated sports bar and restaurant experience
Flexible pricing with multiple discount options

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar and restaurant with a menu available online, offering hand-crafted food and drinks

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: No, complimentary clubs are provided, but you can also use your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has a full bar and restaurant available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to complete a virtual 18 holes can vary depending on the number of players in your bay and the game mode chosen, but typically ranges from 1-2 hours.

faq.question: Is Topgolf Augusta kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, anyone under 16 must be supervised by a guest 21+ at all times, and anyone under 18 must be supervised by a guest 21+ after 9PM.
